qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Chromium deny-list bypass via path traversal and case-insensitive scheme allows arbitrary file read
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable component and sink: this finding targets Chromium URL deny-list filtering for arbitrary file read through /forms/chromium/convert/url and /forms/chromium/screenshot/url, not ExifTool metadata pseudo-tag filtering for arbitrary file write through /forms/pdfengines/metadata/write.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing ReadHeaderTimeout on HTTP server enables Slowloris denial-of-service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding targets missing ReadHeaderTimeout on the API HTTP server, not the ExifTool metadata writer's case-sensitive dangerous pseudo-tag deletion or missing HardLink/SymLink filtering.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described ExifTool metadata root cause in pkg/modules/exiftool/exiftool.go: case-sensitive deletion of FileName/Directory and omission of HardLink/SymLink before passing metadata tags to ExifTool. The final findings concern separate Chromium URL filtering and HTTP header timeout issues.
evidence: Advisory root cause is the ExifTool metadata writer deleting only exact-case FileName and Directory keys and omitting HardLink/SymLink, allowing arbitrary file write/link creation through /forms/pdfengines/metadata/write.
chromium-deny-list-bypass-arbitrary-file-read reports pkg/modules/chromium and pkg/gotenberg URL filter behavior causing arbitrary file read through Chromium conversion endpoints.
missing-read-header-timeout-slowloris-dos reports pkg/modules/api/api.go HTTP server timeout configuration causing Slowloris denial of service.
